title: Trump-Iran agree to two-week ceasefire, plan to open Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: Pakistan Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif had asked Trump for a two-week delay of his Iran deadline, and for the Strait of Hormuz to open for the same period.
summary_public: Pakistan Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif had asked Trump for a two-week delay of his Iran deadline, and for the Strait of Hormuz to open for the same period.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: Trump-Iran agree to two-week ceasefire, plan to open Strait of Hormuz
